text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Early one morning, I'm heading to the<n>training
track for an errand and find<n>that it's currently
under maintenance.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clank, clank, clank, clank, clank!Hisssss!

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Did it break?! The leveler<n>stopped
working all of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Huh? They're still working on the<n>track? I
wonder if something<n>happened.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the delay! Our leveler<n>malfunctioned, but
we're going to fix it<n>up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: No worries! ♪ We can wait!

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper B
text_block_list.text: Wouldn't it be faster to call a<n>mechanic?

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper A
text_block_list.text:
It's the morning rush hour right now.<n>There's no
telling when they can get<n>here.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper B
text_block_list.text:
But there's no guarantee we'll be<n>able to fix this
thing on our own!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No need to rush! There's plenty of<n>time before
school starts! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Just take a deep breath and take<n>things one at a
time!

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper B
text_block_list.text:
You're right. We'll need to get the<n>leveler out of
the way first, then<n>continue smoothing out the
ground...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'll help! You want this thing off the<n>track, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Or would it be better if I give you a<n>hand with the
leveling?

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper A
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to do anything! We<n>appreciate
the thought, but we<n>couldn't possibly make a
student do<n>all that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's all right if I give 'em a hand,<n>right?
What do you think I should help<n>with?
choice_data_list: Can you move the leveler out of the way?
Help level the track by running around it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: On it, boss! Okay, time to puuuush!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We set a steel plate under the leveler<n>so it
doesn't mess up the ground.<n>Then, Hishi
Akebono pushes it with all<n>her might!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Nnnngh! It's so heavy! Just... a little...<n>more!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Phew! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono pushes the leveler off<n>the track,
and the workers manage to<n>finish up
maintenance on schedule.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Sounds good! I'll be done before you<n>know it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono runs along the track<n>carrying the
harrow the workers<n>removed from the leveler.
Her laps<n>leaves the dirt behind her nice and<n>
smooth.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Wow! She's so fast! I think she might<n>be faster
than the leveler itself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's all smoothed out! ☆ What a relief!<n>I'm glad
everything got done before<n>any other students
arrived! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While Hishi Akebono was running,<n>the
mechanics managed to fix the<n>leveler and return
it to the garage.<n>Thus, maintenance was safely<n>
completed.
